title: AngleTracker
description: AngleTracker is a mod that helps players precisely track and save their viewing angles (yaw and pitch), making navigation and building in Minecraft easier!
body:
### **Introduction**
AngleTracker is a Minecraft mod that adds a tool for precisely tracking viewing angles (yaw and pitch). With it, players can more easily navigate, build, and perform complex maneuvers like parkour or ender pearl transportation. This mod is perfect for players who value precision and want to make their Minecraft life easier!

The inspiration for this mod came from [Squibble's](https://www.youtube.com/@squibble111) video, where he demonstrated how to use viewing angles for precise transportation using ender pearls and redstone. With AngleTracker, you can now easily replicate these techniques and discover new applications!

![Preview](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNDVjMDlyZ2hpcTkydThuNDYzeHNzNnp3azJ4MGN3bGR6dTF6cGx4bCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/EyLl0oiqdEAORQId9h/giphy.gif)


### **Main Features**
- **Angle Tracking:** Displays the current yaw and pitch in degrees.
- **Saving Positions:** Press G to save your current viewing angle.
- **Angle Comparison:** The current yaw and pitch change color depending on how close you are to the saved angle.  
- **User Interface:** The angle display is located in the top-left corner of the screen _(can be hidden with the H key)._

### **Use Cases**
- **Parkour:** Use angles to perform complex jumps.
- **Transportation:** Perfect for ender pearl and redstone mechanics, inspired by Squibble's video.

### **Multiplayer**
The mod works on multiplayer servers! Each player has their own saved angles, allowing for individual use of the mod without disrupting others.

_Inspiration video: [The BEST Wireless Redstone System in Minecraft](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X7Ah-SJ0vBc&list=WL&index=4&t=1s)_
